rent.note: furnished 1BR in Oltrarno or Campo di Marte; €900–1,400 typical; Duomo area much higher

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; older stone buildings

diningOut.note: trattorias and wine bars; tourist inflation near Duomo

transit.note: monthly bus pass ~€35; city is walkable

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; growing supply vs demand

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base.

evidence.claim: Florence solo nomad monthly ~$2,150 incl rent
evidence.quote: For a solo digital nomad in Florence, estimated monthly costs are $1,050 (excluding rent), and $2,150 including rent
A centrally located one-bedroom in Florence typically ranges from €700–1,000 per month

evidence.claim: Florence historic centre more expensive; Oltrarno better value
evidence.quote: Florence offers good value compared with Milan or Rome, but can feel pricey in the historic center. Housing and dining costs are higher near the Duomo and Ponte Vecchio, with more affordable options in the Oltrarno
Florence has high rental costs, with one-bedroom apartments averaging $1,790
